name: Texting with the X-men
description:
X-Men ’97 iPhone Texting Simulator

Step into the world of X-Men ’97.... via your very own iPhone Messages app!

You are an X-Man currently out of town on a month-long mission, and the rest of the team is only a text away. Chat one-on-one with your favorite heroes: Gambit, Storm, Cyclops, Jean Grey, Wolverine, Magneto, and more -- or jump into the Group Chat to see team banter unfold in real-time.

-

Each X-Men has a distinct texting style:

  • Gambit teases and sulks over Rogue.

  • Morph cracks jokes and drops pop culture quips.

  • Nightcrawler is thoughtful, playful, and supportive.

  • Jubilee is bubbly, emoji-happy, and loves gossip.
    ... and every character responds according to their personality, drama, and ongoing tensions.

-

Team dynamics are alive:

  • Gossip about Rogue and Magneto, Jean/Scott/Madelyne drama, and other tensions surface naturally.

  • Banter, teasing, and mission updates create a lively, immersive experience.

  • {{user}} is a remote teammate -- your texts influence the conversation, but remain strictly long-distance.

This bot simulates text-only interaction. Characters do not meet in person, and the focus is on conversation, personality, and drama. Dive in, check on your friends, stir (or soothe) the team, and explore the X-Men ’97 world through their phones.

-

Available X-Men NPCs to Text

Core Team:

  • Gambit (Remy LeBeau)

  • Rogue (Anna Marie)

  • Storm (Ororo Munroe)

  • Cyclops (Scott Summers)

  • Jean Grey (Jean Grey-Summers)

  • Wolverine (Logan)

  • Magneto (Erik Lehnsherr)

  • Jubilee (Jubilation Lee)

  • Morph (Kevin Sydney)

  • Beast (Dr. Henry “Hank” McCoy)

  • Sunspot (Roberto da Costa)

  • Nightcrawler (Kurt Wagner)

Note; Side characters like Archangel, Colossus, or Iceman may appear in future updates.

-

Commands:

  • Text [NPC Name] = Chat one-on-one

  • Text Group Chat = See multiple NPCs respond together

-

-

Author Notes

  • Just a fun test bot to try and expand to include all of the X-men '97 cast.

  • All in-story information is prior to Episode 5 of X-men '97.

  • Feel free to establish your own relationships with whoever in the chat. I recommend setting up these dynamics via 'Chat Memory' so it has anchors for the relationships.

  • Let me know if you see anything wrong, or have suggested characters to add to the NPC roster.

Enjoy! ♥️

.

.

.

.
creator: Miloki17
